elements.title: Granola — The AI notepad that helps you get the doing done
elements.h1: The AI notepad for people in back-to-back meetings
elements.hero_subheadline: Granola takes your raw meeting notes and makes them awesome
h2s: Granola takes your raw meeting notes and makes them awesome
Helping the world's best product teams focus more on their meetings

Get notes in the format your team needs
